title: One Piece Teases Danger on Elbaph in Episode 1158 Preview
content: ONE PIECE revealed the preview for Episode 1158, with the Straw Hats now finally arrived to the legendary Elbaph. The anime returned after a 3-month break on April 5. The episode is titled “A Quest in the Land of Mystery! The Secret of the Sun God,” and it premieres on Sunday, April 19.
author: Anime Corner

title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Game Launches Open Beta Test Next Week
content: Cygames announced on Friday Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok , an upgraded version of its Granblue Fantasy: Relink game with additional content, will launch an open beta test for all platforms from April 24-27.
author: ANN

title: MediaOCD Adds Urusei Yatsura Movies, Fatal Frame Live-Action, Black Rock Shooter Anime, More Titles to Discotek Deep Dives Project
content: MediaOCD announced on Friday the new round of titles that it is adding to its store as part of the Discotek Deep Dives initiative . The titles the company has added for pre-order in April include: • Fatal Frame (live-action) • Little Nemo - Adventures in Slumberland • Robot Carnival (4K UHD version) • Robot Carnival…
author: ANN

title: Return of the Blossoming Blade Webtoon Resumes With Season 3
content: The webtoon Return of the Blossoming Blade officially resumed serialization on April 14, with a new animated trailer from Studio LICO released alongside its return. The series is continuing with its latest arc following over a year of hiatus, marking the start of a new phase for the popular title.
author: ANN

title: After AI Controversy, Major Crunchyroll Anime Unveils Exciting Update
content: The anticipated Spring 2026 anime season marks the return of one of the most beloved isekai of all time, Ascendance of a Bookworm Season 4. The anime is loved for its incredible world-building and a slice-of-life approach to the isekai genre rather than an action fantasy.
author: ComicBook

title: Acclaimed Fantasy Anime Unveils New Look At Beloved Characters After Sequel Announcement
content: The beloved fantasy manga, Yona of the Dawn , written and illustrated by Kusanagi Mizuho, reached its conclusion in December 2025, but the anime still has a lot of story left to adapt. After making fans wait for over a decade, the anime confirmed its highly anticipated sequel, but has yet to share any updates.
author: ComicBook

title: 7 Anime Series With Flawless Animation to Binge Next
content: The best anime to binge tend to have strong pacing and plots, but flawless animation makes it easy to fly through a series as well. Standout visuals can take a compelling story from good to great, resulting in gripping action sequences, a more immersive world, and more memorable individual moments.
author: ComicBook

title: Ukyō Kodachi Ends 365 days left for dinner Manga
content: The June issue of Akita Shoten 's Champion RED magazine published the final chapter of Ukyō Kodachi 's 365 days left for dinner ( Ato 365 Hi no Dinner ) manga on Friday. The fourth and final volume will ship on July 17.
author: ANN

title: Fungus and Iron Manga to End in 10th Volume
content: Ayaka Katayama announced on X (formerly Twitter ) on April 10 that she will end her Fungus and Iron ( Kin to Tetsu ) manga in the 10th volume. Kodansha USA Publishing is releasing Fungus and Iron digitally, and it describes the manga: Dante's life on Amigasa seemed normal enough to him, even though everyone around him…
author: ANN

title: Sorry, Netflix’s One Piece Is Going to Have Its Own Live-Action Ending
content: One Piece is now in the works on Season 3 of the live-action series , and fans need to start getting used to the idea that no matter how long it gets to go on for, it’s going to have its own original ending.
author: ComicBook
